commands.author: martingarramon
commands.command: p2 (legacy-entry parity) — keeping as follow-up rather than expanding this pr's scope. current fix lands lifecycle-timestamp parity for entries that carry `sessionstartedat` / `lastinteractionat` directly (the common shape). legacy entries written before those fields existed need the jsonl-header fallback in `resolvesessionlifecycletimestamps` — bringing that in means threading `agentid` through to `prepare-thread-context.ts` and exposing the resolver via the plugin sdk barrel. cleaner as a separate pr if legacy-entry coverage matters before this merges.
commands.freeform_prompt: P2 (legacy-entry parity) — keeping as follow-up rather than expanding this PR's scope. Current fix lands lifecycle-timestamp parity for entries that carry `sessionStartedAt` / `lastInteractionAt` directly (the common shape). Legacy entries written before those fields existed need the JSONL-header fallback in `resolveSessionLifecycleTimestamps` — bringing that in means threading `agentId` through to `prepare-thread-context.ts` and exposing the resolver via the plugin SDK barrel. Cleaner as a separate PR if legacy-entry coverage matters before this merges.
